new_classes.label_en: PDO wine (other than Tokaj), actual alcoholic strength ≤ 15% vol, in containers > 2 l and ≤ 10 l — other (CN 2204 29 28)
new_classes.label_de: Wein mit g.U. (außer Tokaj), vorhandener Alkoholgehalt ≤ 15 % vol, in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 l bis 10 l — anderer (KN 2204 29 28)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.) other than Tokaj, with an actual alcoholic strength not exceeding 15% vol, presented in containers holding more than 10 litres, as defined under Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

coverage_explanation: The legal note for CN codes 2204 29 22–78 identifies wines bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.) per Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22, presented in containers holding more than 10 litres (the 2204 29 series covers containers > 10 L, as opposed to 2204 22 which covers > 2 L and ≤ 10 L). The key discriminating criteria captured are: (1) PDO wine quality, (2) not Tokaj, (3) actual alcoholic strength ≤ 15% vol, (4) large container (> 2 L, using LargeContainer as proxy — the precise lower bound > 10 L for the 2204 29 series cannot be expressed exactly with the existing MediumContainer/LargeContainer vocabulary without a dedicated class for > 10 L containers), (5) not semi-sparkling. Coverage is reduced because: (a) the existing LargeContainer class covers ≥ 2 L rather than > 10 L, so it overlaps with the 2204 22 medium-container subheadings; a dedicated "VeryLargeContainer" (> 10 L) class would be needed for full precision. (b) The sibling breakdown within 2204 29 22–78 (different PDO sub-ranges differentiated by total dry extract or other quality tiers) is referenced only through the Additional Note 6(a) cross-reference which is not fully modelled here. (c) The specific "other" qualifier within the PDO tier (distinguishing 2204 29 28 from 2204 29 26, which may correspond to specific total dry extract ranges) is not captured due to absence of a dry-extract threshold distinction in the running TBox for this sub-tier.
